states.description: Android app drawer with installed apps listed alphabetically
Pro Expense main Home screen with totals and recent transactions
Form to create a new expense entry
visual_cues: continuous-entry loop icon next to SAVE

states.description: Bottom sheet showing details of a transaction
Form to edit an existing expense entry

visual_cues: keyboard icon to switch to text input

states.description: Time picker in manual text-entry mode
Confirmation dialog before deleting an expense
Full list of expense transactions (Expense Logs)
Backup section showing Export/Import and Backup Logs
Bottom sheet to confirm backup filename
Android file picker shown to choose backup save location

strategies.name: ADD_EXPENSE_BASIC
steps: From home_launcher, swipe up to app_drawer (or scroll) to find 'Pro Expense'
Click Pro Expense icon -> home_dashboard
Click FAB '+' bottom-right -> expense_entry
Tap Name field, type expense name
Tap Amount field, type amount
Tap desired category chip (Food/Housing/Social/etc.)
(Optional) tap Note field and type note
(Optional) tap calendar icon to set date, OK
(Optional) tap clock icon (prefer keyboard icon for manual entry) to set time, OK
Click SAVE
Verify new entry appears under Recent on home_dashboard
strategies.success_signal: New entry shows in Recent list with correct name/amount/category icon
strategies.fallback: If amount missing -> tooltip 'Cost is Empty' appears; enter a value and SAVE again

strategies.name: EDIT_EXPENSE
steps: Locate the target entry under Recent (scroll or click MORE -> expense_logs)
Click the entry -> expense_detail
Click EDIT -> update_data
For text fields: long-press field -> Select all -> type new value (overwrites)
For category: tap the desired chip
For date/time: open calendar/clock icon and confirm with OK
Click UPDATE
Verify change reflected in Recent / expense_logs
strategies.success_signal: Returned to home_dashboard and target entry shows updated values
strategies.fallback: If new text appended to old, use long-press + Select all + type, OR use long_press(backspace) on keyboard

strategies.name: DELETE_EXPENSE
steps: Open the entry: click it in Recent or expense_logs -> expense_detail
Click the red trash icon next to title -> delete_confirm
Click CONFIRM
Verify entry no longer appears in Recent/expense_logs
strategies.success_signal: Entry no longer present in lists; totals updated
strategies.fallback: From expense_logs, long-press entry to expose Delete button as alternative

strategies.name: QUERY_TRANSACTION_DETAIL
steps: Open app and reach home_dashboard
Locate target transaction in Recent (or MORE -> expense_logs)
Click transaction -> expense_detail to read Amount/Date/Note
If category label needed, click EDIT -> update_data and read highlighted category chip
Return answer
strategies.success_signal: Required fields read from detail/edit view
strategies.fallback: If date shows 'Today/Yesterday', open EDIT to see absolute date in header

strategies.name: QUERY_DASHBOARD_TOTAL
steps: Open Pro Expense and reach home_dashboard
Read 'Totals' section for INCOME/OUTCOME for the displayed period
Provide value with currency

strategies.name: QUERY_CATEGORY_STATISTICS
steps: Open hamburger menu -> Statistics
Ensure desired date is shown
Read percentage next to target category

strategies.name: BACKUP_EXPORT
steps: Open hamburger menu -> Backup
Click Export -> export_dialog
Click SAVE AS -> system_file_picker
Click SAVE in picker
Verify new entry appears under Backup Logs
strategies.success_signal: New row in Backup Logs with timestamp and item count

strategies.name: ENABLE_CONTINUOUS_ENTRY_AND_ADD
steps: Open FAB '+' to reach expense_entry
Tap the loop/chain icon next to SAVE to enable continuous mode (SAVE becomes NEXT)
Fill Name/Amount/Category as normal
Click NEXT to save and reset form for another entry
strategies.success_signal: Loop icon highlighted; after NEXT, blank form appears ready for next entry
strategies.fallback: Continuous entry is NOT in Settings; do not search there

dead_ends.note: App drawer scrolls vertically; left/right swipes do not change page

dead_ends.failed_action: swipe up missed and triggered long-press menu
dead_ends.note: Opens 'Wallpaper & style / Widgets / Home settings' menu; press Back or Home to recover

dead_ends.failed_action: type new text without clearing field
dead_ends.note: Typing appends to existing value, producing jumbled text; must Select all or long-press backspace first

dead_ends.failed_action: tapping AM/PM toggle on clock face
dead_ends.note: Toggle can be unresponsive; use keyboard icon to switch to manual text entry mode

dead_ends.failed_action: tap hour number on clock face
dead_ends.note: Touch is imprecise; advancing to minute view with wrong hour. Prefer text input.
Settings only contains Language/Currency/Theme; continuous entry toggle is on expense_entry screen
Sometimes opens detail of a different recent item; verify before deleting/editing
Shows 'Cost is Empty' tooltip; must enter a numeric amount (even 0) to proceed
Broccoli is a recipe app; the correct app is 'Pro Expense'

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target app is installed and reachable from the launcher
abstract_steps: Launch the target app from launcher/app list
Open the create-new-entry affordance (commonly a floating + button)
Fill required fields in order: title/name, amount/value, classification (category), optional notes
Adjust date/time via pickers if specified
Commit via save/confirm button
Return to a list/summary view and verify the new entry is present
failure_modes: Required numeric field left blank causing validation error
Typing into a field that still contains default text, producing concatenated text
Wrong app launched due to ambiguous icon/name
Picker dialog closed without confirming, losing the selection
verification_checklist: New entry visible in recent/list view

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry exists in the app's data store
abstract_steps: Navigate to the entry via list/search
Open the entry's detail view
Enter edit mode
Clear existing field content before typing (select-all or long-press backspace)
Apply changes to each requested field (text, classification, date/time)
Commit changes via update/save button
Verify modifications in the list/detail view
failure_modes: Appending new text instead of replacing
Cursor positioned at start so backspace does nothing
Picker confirms inadvertently dismissed, leaving old value
Selecting wrong category chip due to default selection
verification_checklist: Updated values reflected in detail view

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry exists and is identifiable
abstract_steps: Locate the entry in a list (may require expanding/scrolling)
Open detail view or expose row actions
Invoke delete affordance
Confirm in the confirmation dialog
Verify entry is removed from the list
failure_modes: Tapping wrong row due to similar names/dates
Dismissing confirmation accidentally
Mistaking 'MORE' or similar buttons for delete
verification_checklist: Detail view for that entry is no longer accessible

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information is recorded in the app
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant screen (summary dashboard, list, statistics, or item detail)
If summary view lacks precise data, open the item detail or edit view to see absolute values
Read requested fields verbatim
Return answer in requested format
failure_modes: Reading relative date label ('Today'/'Yesterday') instead of absolute date
Value partially occluded by floating buttons
Filtering by wrong date range

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Target screen is reachable through known menu structure
abstract_steps: Open the main navigation drawer/menu
Select the named destination
Confirm landing on the expected screen via headers/visual cues
failure_modes: Looping into the wrong menu (e.g., Settings) searching for a feature located elsewhere
Accidentally triggering long-press menus on the launcher
verification_checklist: Header/title of destination screen matches expectation

categories.name: EXPORT_BACKUP
abstract_steps: Navigate to the backup/export section via the main menu
Trigger the export action
Confirm filename in the export dialog
Choose save location in the system file picker and confirm
Verify a new entry appears in backup history
failure_modes: Dismissing system file picker before saving
Choosing import instead of export
verification_checklist: Backup history shows a new timestamped entry
Saved file exists at chosen location

categories.name: SET_DATE_TIME
abstract_steps: Open the date or time picker via the dedicated icon
If a graphical clock/calendar is imprecise, switch to numeric/text input mode
Enter hour, minute, AM/PM (and year/month/day) explicitly
Confirm the dialog to apply
Re-open header to verify the displayed timestamp
failure_modes: Imprecise taps on clock face selecting adjacent values
AM/PM toggle unresponsive on clock-face mode
Dialog dismissed without confirming
verification_checklist: Header on edit/entry screen shows requested date/time
Saved entry shows the requested date/time after commit

categories.name: TOGGLE_FEATURE
categories.precondition: Feature toggle exists somewhere in the UI
abstract_steps: Look first on the screen where the feature is used (in-context toggles)
If absent, check the settings/preferences screen
Tap the toggle and confirm it visually indicates active state
Proceed with the dependent action
failure_modes: Searching only in settings when the toggle is contextual
Mis-identifying the toggle icon
verification_checklist: Subsequent action behaves according to enabled mode
